rows.label: tev078901_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Toluera about the other Zaruboggan.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078901_MSG0001
rows.name:
They spend their lives fulfilling the calling
given to them by Golbogga—the calling of
devoltanizing and purifying their planet. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078901_MSG0002
rows.name:
And that is all they have done
for who-knows how many eons.
*fsssh* They are a race of fools![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078901_MSG0003
rows.name:
And you're as much of a fool as any of them
for buying into their idiocy instead of
accepting the truth of my words! *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078901_MSG0008
rows.name:
I cannot live with humans who
have been so thoroughly duped by
such Golbogga fanatics. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078901_MSG0009
rows.name:
So if the time comes where I can no longer
live here on my own, I suppose I will go
and surrender to the Growth. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078901_MSG0010
rows.name:
I doubt they would kill me if I offered
my complete obedience. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078901_MSG0011
rows.name:
And if, theoretically, they end up
eradicating all of the Zaruboggan
that have allied with humanity...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078901_MSG0012
rows.name:
then I will have avenged myself
against all of the fools who
repudiated my theories! *fsssh*[ST:wait ]
